texto: I didn’t know if I was straight or gay. But I did know I loved Michael. And it wasn’t just for all the nice things he’d done for me—it was because of who he was, the kind of man he was, the way he treated me… with respect.
explicacao: Citação de Robert P. Rowe sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I didn’t know if I was straight or gay. But I did know I loved Michael. And it wasn’t just for al…” articula amor, love, respect em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como respect.

frase_original: I didn’t know if I was straight or gay. But I did know I loved Michael. And it wasn’t just for all the nice things he’d done for me—it was because of who he was, the kind of man he was, the way he treated me… with respect.
